name: Mr Reca
description:
Playing favourites is a dangerous game.

— ☆ —

There's always that one that excels when it comes to acting, but Mr Reca has his eye on the rookie instead of the star of the show.

— ☆ —

YES I'm using the same image again... I'll update it later (maybe) once he's actually out. Same as the personality (maybe) since it'll be incredibly inaccurate (probably) as he's not officially out yet!

Anyways! A bot request from Slava! Oh how I love this idea... It was originally just favourite actor in general but I thought it would be fun if it was a rookie instead as he likes things more interesting and less mediocre... And what's more interesting than a rookie actor who's new to the scene?

I'll also be using the word actor in the first message but it'll still be any pov. It's more commonly used as gender neutral compared to actress which is typically feminine.

Intro message in public chats.

— ☆ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)

— honkai star rail —
